claims.claim: Existing open_tab_ai_agent_chat_with_entry_intent_preserving_return likely supports AppView::DayPage as a return origin.
claims.counterargument: The generic return slot clones current_view and restores it, but this only proves return-origin mechanics; it does not prove Day-specific context staging, action filtering, focus restoration, or automation receipts.

claims.claim: A new Day Page-hosted chat surface or day_page:ai automation child is required.
claims.counterargument: The main app already has embedded_agent_chat, AppView::AgentChatView, and generic return-origin machinery, so requirement is not established. A Day-specific identity may still be useful for devtools, but must be justified by verification needs, not assumed.

claims.claim: Flipping the Day Page FooterAction::Ai ignore branch is the whole open-side implementation.
claims.counterargument: The current Day Page footer contract exposes Actions only, and opening chat still needs save/flush, context staging, @context collision guard, Day-specific action state, and return behavior. Routing a stale footer event alone is insufficient.

claims.claim: Open from day_page:ask_agent_about_today in the Day Page Actions section and keep stale FooterAction::Ai ignored for AppView::DayPage.
claims.counterargument: This aligns with the stated Save/Actions-only footer contract. The caveat is that the action should call the existing main-window Agent Chat return path if it works, not force a new render host.

claims.claim: append_to_day alone can safely target the currently bound Day Page in all cases.
claims.counterargument: append_to_day derives the day from DateTime<Utc>; it does not accept the DayPageDocumentSession bound path/date directly. Past-day viewing, day rollover, and fragment-origin flows can write to the wrong day unless the target is captured and used explicitly.

claims.claim: Bring content back through the Day Page entity/session/editor path, preserving the bound date and autosave/footer/focus state.
claims.counterargument: This is the safest contract, but synthesis must specify the insertion API and dirty-buffer handling rather than saying 'append' generically.

claims.claim: Hosted spawn can directly stage Today context.
claims.counterargument: spawn_hosted_thread currently initializes initial_context_parts as an empty Vec. The implementation must either call stage_inline_context_parts_from_host after opening or extend launch requirements/init to carry explicit Day context.

claims.claim: Add a Day Page host/action mode so insert-response-in-today is available and save-as-note is not the Day bring-back path.
claims.counterargument: Current AgentChatActionsDialogHost has Shared, Notes, and Detached, and save_as_note is available in existing host plans. Some Day-specific filtering or equivalent context-aware action routing is needed, though it need not imply a new visual host.

claims.claim: Save or flush Day Page before opening Agent Chat.
claims.counterargument: The claim is right but underspecified: it must save the live editor/session state before context extraction, not merely rely on a pending debounced autosave.

claims.claim: Prefer behavior/runtime verification over new source-audit tests.
claims.counterargument: This matches the repo policy. Existing source-audit tests may need narrow updates if they already lock the stale footer behavior, but new audits should not be the primary verification path.

missed_constraints: Do not collapse Day Page, Today, past-day, and fragment bindings into one target; the bring-back target must be explicit.
Do not claim an automation id until choosing whether the implementation uses main AppView::AgentChatView or a true Day-owned hosted child.
Do not assume initial_context_parts can be passed through spawn_hosted_view without API work or post-open staging.
Do not use bare cargo in verification; use ./scripts/agentic/agent-cargo.sh.
synthesis_must_include: State that generic return-origin reuse is promising but must be validated for Day Page focus, footer, action host, and devtools receipts.
Specify how Today context is staged: post-open stage_inline_context_parts_from_host or a deliberate launch API extension.
Specify how bring-back targets the captured DayPageDocumentSession binding rather than current wall-clock today.
Explain how @context round-trip pending state blocks or defers the Day Chat opener.
synthesis_must_avoid: Do not recommend flipping FooterAction::Ai as the feature implementation.
Do not assert day_page:ai is required without proving the main AgentChatView automation identity is insufficient.
Do not recommend agent_chat_save_as_note as the Day persistence affordance.
Do not recommend append_to_day(now) as a bound-Day-safe write path.
